import axios from'axios';const API_BASE_URL='http://localhost:5000/api';// Create axios instance
const api=axios.create({baseURL:API_BASE_URL,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}});// Add token to requests if it exists
api.interceptors.request.use(config=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('token');if(token){config.headers.Authorization="Bearer ".concat(token);}return config;},error=>Promise.reject(error));// Auth API
export const authAPI={login:(email,password)=>api.post('/login',{email,password})};// User API
export const userAPI={getAll:()=>api.get('/users'),seed:()=>api.post('/seed-users')};// AI API
export const aiAPI={analyze:username=>api.get("/analyze/".concat(username)),fix:username=>api.post("/fix/".concat(username))};// Health API
export const healthAPI={check:()=>api.get('/health')};export default api;
